title: Uptown Redevelopment Project Announced
summary: The former Duke Energy headquarters will be transformed into 448 apartments and new retail space near Bank of America Stadium.
charlotte_impact: Addresses housing needs and boosts the local economy through job creation and increased consumer spending in the uptown area.

title: CMPD Officer Charged with Assault
summary: Officer Ryan Clement is placed on unpaid administrative leave following an assault charge, pending investigation results.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about police conduct and accountability, potentially impacting community trust in law enforcement.

title: Charlotte Families Face Shelter Age Limit Crisis
summary: Shelter age limits leave families with teens without housing options, forcing some to live in cars, advocates warn.
charlotte_impact: Highlights critical gaps in social services and the urgent need for family housing assistance in Charlotte.

title: South Carolina Issues Statewide Burn Ban
summary: The South Carolina Forestry Commission enacts a ban on all outdoor burning, effective 4 p.m. March 27, until further notice.
charlotte_impact: Aims to prevent wildfires during dry conditions, protecting forests, property, and public health across the state.

title: Kathie Dello's Impact as NC State Climatologist
summary: A look at Kathie Dello's tenure as North Carolina's first state climatologist (2019-2025) and her current role at NCDEQ.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes contributions to climate science and environmental policy in North Carolina.

title: CMPD Faces Lawsuit Over 2020 Protest Response
summary: A judge is reviewing whether CMPD used unlawful force during 2020 protests, with plaintiffs alleging protesters were trapped and met with force.
charlotte_impact: Addresses police conduct during protests and its implications for freedom of assembly and police accountability.

title: Red Flag Warning Issued for North Carolina
summary: Warm temperatures, low humidity, and strong winds combine to create an increased risk of wildfires across North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to heightened fire danger and the need for caution to prevent potentially devastating wildfires.

title: Charlotte Experiences Very Warm Friday
summary: Friday is expected to be a record-breaking day with unseasonably warm temperatures in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights unusual weather patterns and potential impacts on local activities and energy consumption.

title: Woman Killed in North Charlotte Shooting
summary: A woman was fatally shot through her front door at a north Charlotte apartment complex late Thursday night.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about violent crime and safety in residential areas of Charlotte.

title: Suspects Indicted in 2022 Chester County Murder
summary: Two men are indicted for the 2022 murder of Darius Minter in Chester County, facing multiple charges.
charlotte_impact: Brings progress in a cold case, offering some closure to the victim's family and the community.

title: Charlotte Knights Kick Off Baseball Season
summary: The Charlotte Knights begin their season with a weekend series against the Durham Bulls, featuring fireworks and family events.
charlotte_impact: Provides entertainment and community engagement opportunities in Charlotte.

title: Man Charged with Murder in East Charlotte Shooting
summary: A 22-year-old man is charged with first-degree murder in the fatal shooting of Luis Gutierrez Mora in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses violent crime and its impact on the community, highlighting ongoing efforts to bring perpetrators to justice.

title: Parents Charged After Gun Found in Student's Backpack
summary: Parents in West Jefferson face felony charges after a firearm was discovered in their child's backpack at Westwood Elementary.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about school safety and responsible gun ownership in the community.

title: "No Kings" Protests Planned in Charlotte Area
summary: Multiple "No Kings" protests are scheduled across the Charlotte region as part of a nationwide movement.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing social and political activism in the Charlotte area.

title: TSA Under Strain at Charlotte Airport
summary: Officials warn that the TSA is 'under serious strain' due to the shutdown, impacting Charlotte's economy with delays and missed flights.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of government shutdowns on essential services and the local economy.
